name: cobalt

metadata.name: cobalt
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: GNU Lesser General Public License v3 or later (LGPLv3+)
metadata.summary: A lightweight library for working with Akoma Ntoso Act documents

documentation:
# Cobalt

![image](https://laws.africa/img/icons/cobalt.png)

[![image](https://badge.fury.io/py/cobalt.svg)](http://badge.fury.io/py/cobalt)

Cobalt is a lightweight Python library for working with [Akoma Ntoso](http://www.akomantoso.org/) documents. It makes it
easy to work with Akoma Ntoso documents, metadata and FRBR URIs.

It is lightweight because most operations are done on the XML document directly without intermediate objects. You still
need to understand how Akoma Ntoso works.

Read the [full documentation at cobalt.readthedocs.io](http://cobalt.readthedocs.io/en/latest/).

## Quickstart

Install using:

    $ pip install cobalt

Use it like this:

    >>> from cobalt import Act
    >>> act = Act()
    >>> act.title = "Act 10 of 1980"
    >>> act.frbr_uri = "/za/act/1980-05-03/10"
    >>> act.frbr_uri.year
    '1980'
    >>> act.frbr_uri.date
    '1980-05-03'
    >>> act.frbr_uri.number
    '10'
    >>> act.frbr_uri.doctype
    'act'
    >>> print act.to_xml()
    [ lots of xml ]

## Contributing

1.  Clone the repo
2.  Install development dependencies:

        pip install -e .[dev]

3.  Make your changes
4.  Run tests:

        nosetests && flake8 cobalt

5.  Send a pull request

## Releasing a new version

1. Run the tests with `python -m unittest`
2. Update the version by changing the `__version__` variable in [`cobalt/__init__.py`](cobalt/__init__.py)
3. Commit your changes and push to the master branch on GitHub
4. Create a release in GitHub and it will automatically be pushed to PyPi

# License

modules.name: cobalt.schemas
documentation:
Cobalt can validate Akoma Ntoso documents against the Akoma Ntoso schema. Two schemas are provided:

1. Strict: the `official AKN schema <http://docs.oasis-open.org/legaldocml/akn-core/v1.0/os/part2-specs/schemas/akomantoso30.xsd>`_
2. Lenient: a slightly modified version of the official schema. Duplicate eId attributes are allowed, and FRBRdate
   elements are allowed to have year-only @date values.

functions.name: cobalt.schemas.validate
documentation:
Validate this AKN document against its schema. if `strict` is True,
then also validate the uniqueness of eId attributes. Returns a (validates, errors)
tuple.

functions.name: cobalt.schemas.validate_xml
documentation: Validate an XML tree against a schema, returning a (validates, errors) tuple.

functions.name: cobalt.schemas.get_schema
documentation: Get an XML schema for a namespace.

functions.name: cobalt.schemas.assert_validates
documentation:
Assert that this AKN document validates against the AKN schema.
Raises `lxml.etree.DocumentInvalid` if validation fails.

classes.name: cobalt.hierarchical.AmendmentEvent
documentation:
An event that amended a document.

```
ivar date

ivar amending_title

String title of the amending document

ivar amending_uri

String form of the FRBR URI of the amending document
```

classes.name: cobalt.hierarchical.RepealEvent

An event that repealed a document.

```
ivar date

ivar repealing_title

String title of the repealing document

ivar repealing_uri

String form of the FRBR URI of the repealing document
```

methods.name: cobalt.uri.FrbrUri.work_uri
documentation: String form of the work URI.

methods.name: cobalt.uri.FrbrUri.expression_uri

methods.name: cobalt.uri.FrbrUri.manifestation_uri

methods.name: cobalt.uri.FrbrUri.parse
documentation:
Parse a string into an FrbrUri instance.

```
raises ValueError

if parsing fails
```

methods.name: cobalt.uri.FrbrUri.year
documentation: The year, derived from {data}`date`. Read-only.

methods.name: cobalt.uri.FrbrUri.place
documentation: Full place code, including both country and locality (if present).

An object for working with
[Akoma Ntoso 3.0 FRBR URIs](https://docs.oasis-open.org/legaldocml/akn-nc/v1.0/os/akn-nc-v1.0-os.html) (IRIs).

URIs can be parsed from a plain string using {meth}`parse` or they can be
constructed directly. URIs can be manipulated in-place once constructed,
which is useful for turning a work-level URI into an expression or
manifestation URI.

URIs can be transformed back to the string form of work, expression and
manifestation URIs using the {meth}`work_uri`, {meth}`expression_uri` and
{meth}`manifestation_uri` methods.

Example:

```
>>> uri = FrbrUri.parse('/akn/za-jhb/act/by-law/2003/public-health/eng:2015-01-01/!main~part_1.xml')
>>> uri.prefix
'akn'
>>> uri.country
'za'
>>> uri.locality
'jhb'
>>> uri.doctype
'act'
>>> uri.subtype
'by-law'
>>> uri.date
'2003'
>>> uri.number
'public-health'
>>> uri.language
'eng'
>>> uri.expression_date
':2015-01-01'
>>> uri.work_component
'main'
>>> uri.portion
'part_1'
>>> uri.format
'xml'
>>> uri.work_uri()
'/za-jhb/act/by-law/2003/public-health'
>>> uri.expression_uri()
'/za-jhb/act/by-law/2003/public-health/eng:2015-01-01/!main~part_1'
>>> uri.manifestation_uri()
'/za-jhb/act/by-law/2003/public-health/eng:2015-01-01/!main~part_1.xml'
```

```
ivar prefix

optional  prefix

ivar country

two letter country code

ivar locality

locality within the country, may be None

ivar doctype

type of document (eg. act)

ivar subtype

document subtype, may be None

ivar actor

emenating actor, may be None

ivar date

document data (str), YYYY[-MM[-DD]]

ivar number

document number (str)

ivar work_component

name of the work component, may be None

ivar language

three-letter expression language code, may be None

ivar expression_date

expression date (str), [@:]YYYY[-MM[-DD]], may be None

ivar format

format extension, may be None
```

modules.name: cobalt.akn
documentation:
Cobalt's class hierarchy mimics that of the Akoma Ntoso standard. There is a single root class for
all Akoma Ntoso documents. There are subclasses for each of the Akoma Ntoso document structure types,
such as hierarchicalStructure, debateStructure, etc. Finally, there is a class for each Akoma Ntoso
document type (act, bill, judgment, etc.) that extends the corresponding structure type.

functions.name: cobalt.akn.datestring
documentation: Format a date as an XML-suitable string. If the date is None, uses NULL_DATE.

functions.name: cobalt.akn.parsedate
documentation: Parse an XML date string into a real date. If the value is the NULL_DATE, returns None.

classes.name: cobalt.akn.AkomaNtosoDocument

methods.name: cobalt.akn.AkomaNtosoDocument.parse
documentation: Parse XML and ensure it's Akoma Ntoso with a known namespace. Raises ValueError on error.

methods.name: cobalt.akn.AkomaNtosoDocument.ensure_element
documentation:
Helper to get an element if it exists, or create it if it doesn't.

```
param name

dotted path from  or 

param after

element after which to place the new element if it doesn't exist

param at

element at which to start looking, (defaults to self if None)
```

methods.name: cobalt.akn.AkomaNtosoDocument.get_element
documentation: Lookup a dotted-path element, start at root (or self if root is None). Returns None if the element doesn't exist.

Base class for Akoma Ntoso documents.

```
ivar root

 root of the XML document

ivar namespace

primary XML namespace
```

classes.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument

methods.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.for_document_type
documentation: Return the subclass for this document type.

methods.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.empty_document
documentation: Return XML for an empty document of this type, using the given AKN version.

methods.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.empty_meta
documentation: Create a meta element for an frbr_uri, using the provided version or element maker.

methods.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.__init__
documentation: Setup a new instance with the string in `xml`, or an empty document if the XML is not given.

methods.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.parse
documentation:
Parse XML and ensure it's Akoma Ntoso.
Raises ValueError on error. Returns the root element.

methods.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.main
documentation: Get the main document element (normally the first child of the root element).

methods.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.main_content
documentation: Get the main content element of the document.

methods.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.meta
documentation: Get the meta element of the document.

methods.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.title
documentation: Short title

methods.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.work_date
documentation:
Date from the FRBRWork element. Normally, this date must match the date portion of the work's FRBR URI.
However, since that may be a partial date (such as just a year), this return value may be different to the
date string stored in the FRBRdate element. In particular, if the date is just a year, the month and day
both default to 1.

methods.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.expression_date
documentation: Date from the FRBRExpression element

methods.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.manifestation_date
documentation: Date from the FRBRManifestation element

methods.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.language
documentation: The 3-letter ISO-639-2 language code of this document.

methods.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.frbr_uri
documentation: The FRBR Manifestation URI as a {class}`cobalt.uri.FrbrUri` instance that uniquely identifies this document universally.

methods.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.expression_frbr_uri
documentation:
The FRBR Expression URI as a {class}`cobalt.uri.FrbrUri` instance that uniquely identifies this document
universally.

methods.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.components
documentation:
Get an `OrderedDict` of component name to {class}`lxml.objectify.ObjectifiedElement`
objects. Components are this document, and `<component>` and `<attachment>` elements inside this document.

methods.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.get_portion_element
documentation:
Get a single portion of this document. The `portion` is usually an eId, as specified by
https://docs.oasis-open.org/legaldocml/akn-nc/v1.0/os/akn-nc-v1.0-os.html#_Toc531692279.

The optional `component` is the ancestor element within which to look for the portion.

Range portions (eg. `chp_1->chp_3`) are not supported by this function.

class_variables.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.structure_type
documentation: The name of this document's structural type.

class_variables.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.main_content_tag
documentation: The name of the structural type's main content element.

class_variables.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.document_type
documentation: The name of the document type, corresponding to the primary document XML element.

class_variables.name: cobalt.akn.StructuredDocument.non_eid_portions
documentation: Portion names that are valid portions, but don't have eids, for use with get_portion_element.
Common base class for AKN documents with a known document structure.
